papers.title: GRAIL: Generating Humanoid Loco-Manipulation from 3D Assets and Video Priors
M3imic: Learning a Versatile Whole-Body Controller for Multimodal Motion Mimicking
CoRe-MoE: Contrastive Reweighted Mixture of Experts for Multi-Terrain Humanoid Locomotion with Gait Adaptation
Humanoid-GPT: Scaling Data and Structure for Zero-Shot Motion Tracking
papers.summary: 提出Humanoid-GPT，一种基于大规模(20亿帧)动作语料库预训练的GPT风格Transformer，实现对人体高度动态行为的零样本追踪与泛化。

papers.title: Let the Dynamics Flow: Stable Flow Matching Dynamical Systems
papers.summary: 论文提出Stable Flow Matching Dynamical Systems (SFMDS)框架，首次将高容量flow matching生成模型与Lyapunov形式化稳定性保证相结合，通过软约束惩罚或硬结构嵌入两种方式确保生成的运动策略满足稳定性质。

companyNews.title: Why JPMorgan suddenly thinks Tesla is much more than a car company - The Independent
companyNews.summary: JPMorgan转变观点认为Tesla不仅限于汽车业务，暗示其AI、机器人等新增长领域获机构认可，为人形机器人行业注入资本信心和发展预期。

companyNews.title: Why Hyundai's Atlas Robot Is Training Hard at Soccer - Seoul Economic Daily
companyNews.summary: 现代汽车旗下波士顿动力公司的Atlas人形机器人正在练习踢足球，该技术展示运动控制与AI决策的突破，推动人形机器人

companyNews.title: Hyundai Motor's soccer robot learns year of skills in 1 day - The Korea Times
companyNews.summary: Hyundai研发足球机器人通过AI强化学习在1天内掌握通常需1年训练的运动技能。该突破展示人形机器人快速学习能力重大进步，推动行业技术发展。

companyNews.title: Hyundai launches School of Football campaign featuring Atlas robot - Let's Data Science
"How Atlas Learned the Rabona Kick": Hyundai Releases Soccer Training Film - Seoul Economic Daily
companyNews.summary: 波士顿动力Atlas机器人学会Rabona踢球技巧，现代汽车发布训练视频展示其动态运动控制能力，标志着双足机器人在复杂肢体协调技术上取得新突破。
